detectors.name: arbitrary-send-erc20-permit
detectors.description: transferFrom uses arbitrary from with permit

detectors.name: arbitrary-send-eth
detectors.description: Functions that send Ether to arbitrary destinations

detectors.name: cache-array-length
detectors.description: Detects `for` loops that use `length` member of some storage array in their loop condition and don't modify it.

detectors.name: chainlink-feed-registry
detectors.description: Detect when chainlink feed registry is used

detectors.name: chronicle-unchecked-price
detectors.description: Detect when Chronicle price is not checked.

detectors.name: pragma
detectors.description: If different pragma directives are used

detectors.name: constable-states
detectors.description: State variables that could be declared constant

detectors.name: immutable-states
detectors.description: State variables that could be declared immutable

detectors.name: cyclomatic-complexity
detectors.description: Detects functions with high (> 11) cyclomatic complexity

detectors.name: delegatecall-loop
detectors.description: Payable functions using `delegatecall` inside a loop

detectors.name: domain-separator-collision
detectors.description: Detects ERC20 tokens that have a function whose signature collides with EIP-2612's DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()

detectors.name: external-function
detectors.description: Public function that could be declared external

detectors.name: gelato-unprotected-randomness
detectors.description: Call to _requestRandomness within an unprotected function

detectors.name: incorrect-return
detectors.description: If a `return` is incorrectly used in assembly mode.

detectors.name: incorrect-using-for
detectors.description: Detects using-for statement usage when no function from a given library matches a given type

detectors.name: mapping-deletion
detectors.description: Deletion on mapping containing a structure

detectors.name: incorrect-modifier
detectors.description: Modifiers that can return the default value

detectors.name: optimism-deprecation
detectors.description: Detect when deprecated Optimism predeploy or function is used.

detectors.name: variable-scope
detectors.description: Local variables used prior their declaration

detectors.name: pyth-unchecked-confidence
detectors.description: Detect when the confidence level of a Pyth price is not checked

detectors.name: pyth-unchecked-publishtime
detectors.description: Detect when the publishTime of a Pyth price is not checked

detectors.name: reentrancy-balance
detectors.description: Reentrancy vulnerabilities leading to outdated balance checks

detectors.name: reentrancy-events
detectors.description: Reentrancy vulnerabilities leading to out-of-order Events

detectors.name: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
detectors.description: Reentrancy vulnerabilities through send and transfer

detectors.name: return-bomb
detectors.description: A low level callee may consume all callers gas unexpectedly.

detectors.name: return-leave
detectors.description: If a `return` is used instead of a `leave`.

detectors.name: shadowing-abstract
detectors.description: State variables shadowing from abstract contracts

detectors.name: incorrect-shift
detectors.description: The order of parameters in a shift instruction is incorrect.

detectors.name: storage-array
detectors.description: Signed storage integer array compiler bug

detectors.name: suicidal
detectors.description: Functions allowing anyone to destruct the contract

detectors.name: tautological-compare
detectors.description: Comparing a variable to itself always returns true or false, depending on comparison

detectors.name: too-many-digits
detectors.description: Conformance to numeric notation best practices

detectors.name: unindexed-event-address
detectors.description: Events with address parameters but no indexed parameters

detectors.name: uninitialized-fptr-cst
detectors.description: Uninitialized function pointer calls in constructors

detectors.name: var-read-using-this
detectors.description: Contract reads its own variable using `this`

results.description:
NativeOFTAdapter._credit(address,uint256,uint32) (lib/layerzero-devtools/packages/oft-evm/contracts/NativeOFTAdapter.sol#106-119) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- (success,data) = address(_to).call{value: _amountLD}() (lib/layerzero-devtools/packages/oft-evm/contracts/NativeOFTAdapter.sol#112)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) uses assembly
	- INLINE ASM (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#227-234)
	- INLINE ASM (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#240-249)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#265)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#257)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- low = low / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#245)
	- result = low * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#272)

Math.invMod(uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#315-361) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- quotient = gcd / remainder (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#337)
	- (gcd,remainder) = (remainder,gcd - remainder * quotient) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#339-346)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#263)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#261)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#266)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#264)

OFTCore._removeDust(uint256) (lib/layerzero-devtools/packages/oft-evm/contracts/OFTCore.sol#343-345) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- (_amountLD / decimalConversionRate) * decimalConversionRate (lib/layerzero-devtools/packages/oft-evm/contracts/OFTCore.sol#344)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#262)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) has bitwise-xor operator ^ instead of the exponentiation operator **: 
	 - inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#257)
